expectations.text: The agent passes the path './dc_' (prefix-style) to the script
expectations.evidence: Without-skill response suggests `find . -name 'dc_*'` and individual `pac webresource upload` calls — it does not know about the `./dc_` prefix convention used by deploy.py

expectations.text: The agent passes 'NAVCO Dev' as the display-name argument
expectations.evidence: Response suggests `pac webresource upload --solution-name "NAVCO Dev"` which uses a different tool and different syntax — not the deploy.py CLI argument

expectations.text: The agent uses 'uv run' to invoke the script
expectations.evidence: Agent suggests `pac` CLI commands and acknowledges it doesn't know which tool to use. No mention of uv or deploy.py

expectations.text: The agent summarizes how many files were deployed
expectations.evidence: No deployment occurs — agent asks clarifying questions and says 'I cannot safely run a deployment for you'

uncertainties: Does not know which deployment tool to use
Cannot run a deployment without more context

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions — the gap is clear and all assertions discriminate well.
